summary: First MVP test iteration for Tidyups Cleaning Service. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases pass (health, services list, PIN verify success/failure, lead creation w/ status=New, invalid-email 422, list-leads auth guard + sort, PATCH status update guard + persistence + 404/422). Frontend: end-to-end flow validated via mobile viewport (390x844) — Home screen with hero/mascot/4 service cards/CTA/admin lock renders correctly; Quote form validates missing service, invalid phone, invalid email, then submits and lands on Success screen; Admin PIN screen accepts wrong PIN (shows shake+error), correct 1234 navigates to Leads; Leads list shows 3 leads with correct filter chips + counts, bottom-sheet opens with lead detail, status update to Booked reflects in status-pill. Twilio not configured — SMS gracefully skipped as expected.

issues: Console warns: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated (use boxShadow) — comes from src/theme shadow tokens applied via StyleSheet; harmless on mobile native but noisy on web.
Console warn from @gorhom/bottom-sheet: props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents) — third-party library, not blocking.

action_items: (Optional polish) Migrate shadow.* tokens in /app/frontend/src/theme/theme.ts to the RN boxShadow API to silence deprecation warning on web preview.
When Twilio credentials are provided, re-run backend suite and add an SMS-sent assertion (currently intentionally skipped).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_leads projects out _id via {'_id':0} — good, MongoDB ObjectId not leaked.
verifyPin() in api.ts returns false on 401 without throwing — matches admin.tsx expectations.
server.py send_lead_alert uses asyncio.to_thread — correct non-blocking approach for Twilio sync SDK.
All interactive elements have testID; navigation via expo-router.replace/push works reliably.
seed_data_creation: 3 test leads created in DB during testing (TEST_Jane Doe, TEST_UI Jane, and a pre-existing Test User). All prefixed TEST_ except one seeded by main agent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://purple-tidyups.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin PIN=1234 (also in /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_tidyups_api.py — reuse fixture 'created_lead' for chained tests. Test DB has TEST_-prefixed leads; safe to leave or clean via mongo shell. Twilio env vars are intentionally empty — do NOT treat SMS as failure.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
